name: deutschflow-platform
description: DeutschFlow Hostinger single-domain build with production admin workflow drawers, visible loading/saving states, full CRUD dashboards, and legacy content import.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,ADMIN -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @deutschflow/api" "npm run dev -w @deutschflow/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @deutschflow/shared && npm run build -w @deutschflow/api && npm run build -w @deutschflow/admin && node scripts/copy-admin-dist.mjs
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @deutschflow/shared && npm run typecheck -w @deutschflow/api && npm run typecheck -w @deutschflow/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @deutschflow/api && npm run lint -w @deutschflow/admin
scripts.build:admin: npm run build -w @deutschflow/shared && npm run build -w @deutschflow/admin && node scripts/copy-admin-dist.mjs
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @deutschflow/shared && npm run build -w @deutschflow/api
